title: If It Should Come To Be
content:
If it should come to be,
    This proof of you and me,
    This type and sign
    Of hours that smiled and shone,
    And yet seemed dead and gone
    As old-world wine:

    Of Them Within the Gate
    Ask we no richer fate,
    No boon above,
    For girl child or for boy,
    My gift of life and joy,
    Your gift of love.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Ernest Henley delivers a powerful performance in "If It Should Come To Be"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
